title: Vanille
description: A vanilla-plus modpack that I wish was actually vanilla.
body:
I made a vanilla-plus modpack I made for friends that doesn't change the core progression of the game. It has new terrain generation, rarer structures and simple QoL mods; trying to deal with the inventory management issue. The goal was to be able to update the world without the mods, so I barely added new items and blocks.

There are two versions, where the server has mods exclusive to the server as to improve client-side performance.
